title: My Work - Multiple People Columns
excerpt:

posts.author: Harshil (Harshil)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

At the moment it isn’t possible to have multiple People columns on a board without all of them being reflected in My Work. When a board contains more than one People column, My Work will always aggregate assignments from all People columns, and there’s currently no way to tell it to reference only one specific column.

What are you trying to achieve

Be able to define which People column will show in My Work

posts.author: fmiller (Forrest Miller)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes! With the recent addition of the “mute assign notifications,” “omit from my work” would fully round out people column functionality.

posts.author: Harshil (Harshil)
posts.cookedHtml: Where can I find the ‘omit from my work’ setting?
